reasoning: Given the lack of current live data for late 2025 available through tools, I must rely on base rates and historical trends. Historically, the top Spotify artist is highly competitive among a few juggernauts: Taylor Swift, Bad Bunny, The Weeknd, and Drake. While The Weeknd frequently dominates in 'monthly listeners' (indicating broad reach), the 'most streamed artist of the year' usually goes to artists with massive, highly-streamed back catalogs and fanatic daily engagement—such as Bad Bunny (winner in 2020-2022) or Taylor Swift (winner in 2023). Taylor Swift's immense daily stream totals make her the likely favorite against any competitor unless The Weeknd had an unprecedentedly massive release year in 2025. I assign The Weeknd an 18% chance, reflecting his status as a perennial top-3 contender but an underdog for the absolute #1 spot in total yearly streams compared to Swift.
